title: Gpc3-targeted molecules and uses thereof
abstract: The presently disclosed subject matter provides binding molecules for glypican-3 (GPC3), including antibodies or antigen-binding fragments thereof that bind to GPC3 and antigen recognizing receptors ( e.g. , CARs) that target GPC3. Also provided are cells and compositions comprising such binding molecules, and methods for treating diseases or disorders associated with GPC3, e.g. , hepatocellular carcinoma.
